name: Stones of Solace
short_description: Stones of Solace is a minimalistic and contemplative ritual, offering you a quiet space for relaxation. Find out what your idol is every day, and take some of your time to craft them a gift.
detailed_description:
Stones of Solace is a minimalistic and contemplative ritual, offering you a quiet space for relaxation. Find out what your idol is every day, and take some of your time to craft them a gift.

The game offers a different shrine each day, that the player can visit whenever they feel like. Each zone brings a new atmosphere and new items to play with. After a time of contemplation and self reflection around the stone statue, players might enjoy arranging the items in the way they like, as an offering for the statue and for themselves.

A game by Dziff & Armel Gibson
Music by Jason Sutherland

Stones of Solace is part of Ice Water Games democratic label~
